_verification: Typical published amp-ratio values in the style of the Bussmann Selectivity Ratio Guide (time-delay upstream family). Ratios differ by manufacturer and fuse series — ALWAYS confirm with the manufacturer's current selectivity guide or TCC overlay before relying on coordination.
ref: Manufacturer selectivity ratio tables (e.g. Bussmann SPD / Mersen coordination guides)
note: Ratio = upstream rating / downstream rating. 'selective' means the published minimum ratio is met for fuses of the listed classes; anything outside the table returns 'verify with manufacturer TCC'.
